title: fissistigma kingii var. fagifolium
intro: Fissistigma kingii var. fagifolium, also known as the Chinese dogbane or fagifolium, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Annonaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Fissistigma kingii var. fagifolium include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Fissistigma kingii var. fagifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, and its roots and rhizomes are also used in traditional Chinese medicine preparations.
